final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an original, non-infringing museum-style Chinese infographic poster featuring a full-body photorealistic figure in traditional Chinese ethnic minority costume, presented as a scholarly illustrated reference plate in the style of a national museum exhibition panel.

Style/medium: museum exhibition panel / historical costume atlas / wenbo infographic; photorealistic central figure; silk-paper or off-white aged paper texture background (米白、绢纸白、浅茶色); restrained, scholarly, collectible aesthetic — NOT poster, NOT e-commerce, NOT anime, NOT cosplay
Composition: full vertical layout — top: 中文主标题 + 副标题 + 导语; left column: structural exploded-view with Chinese leader-line annotations and close-up detail insets; upper-right: material/craft/texture swatches with Chinese captions; mid-right: pattern/color/symbolism zone with main color palette swatches, pattern samples, and cultural explanations; bottom: dressing-sequence flow diagram + core characteristics summary panel; central zone: full-body standing figure as primary subject
Subject: a representative figure in a complete traditional Chinese ethnic minority costume system (ethnic group, garment system, key components, era style, and construction details to be determined by the model's best judgment for visual richness and cultural representativeness)
Scene/backdrop: flat off-white aged paper texture (米白 / 绢纸白 / 浅茶色), no environmental scene, no gradient wash — clean scholarly background
Lighting/mood: even diffused light, no dramatic shadows; scholarly, neutral, high-legibility mood
Color palette: determined by the chosen ethnic costume's authentic color system; background restricted to 米白、绢纸白、浅茶色; annotation lines and typography in dark ink
Materials/textures: all material swatches must show photorealistic fabric texture (silk, embroidery, brocade, felt, etc. as appropriate); no fake or illustrated textures
Text (verbatim): 所有文字必须为简体中文，清晰、规整、可读；包含：中文主标题、副标题、导语、结构部件标注、材质说明、纹样寓意、色彩含义、穿着顺序流程、核心特征总结；不得出现英文、拼音、乱码或错字
Constraints: all text must be simplified Chinese characters only — no English, no pinyin, no garbled characters, no typos; layout must strictly follow the five-zone structure described in Composition; central figure must be full-body standing pose; all annotations must use clean leader lines pointing to correct structural parts; material swatches must be realistic; the overall feel must be 国家博物馆展板 / 历史服饰图鉴 / 文博专题信息图
Avoid: poster aesthetic, photo-studio aesthetic, e-commerce aesthetic, anime/illustration aesthetic, cosplay aesthetic, incorrect structural annotations, blurry or unreadable text, fake or over-stylized material textures, excessive decorative elements, English text, pinyin, garbled characters

Text (verbatim): 所有文字必须为简体中文，清晰、规整、可读；包含：中文主标题、副标题、导语、结构部件标注、材质说明、纹样寓意、色彩含义、穿着顺序流程、核心特征总结；不得出现英文、拼音、乱码或错字
